[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000011001 3
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000010 1
6 0101000110 4
7 0000101000 2

01 1000000001 2
12 0001000110 3
23 0000111001 4
34 0000000000 a match 1 2 3 4

56 1000100000 2
67 0010000000 1
70 0001101000 3
